## Problem

What are you trying to do that specd makes hard or impossible today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. Note any interaction with specd's invariants
(stdlib-only, zero LLM calls, deterministic output, the Foundational Split, the
evidence gate).

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed.
